info.name: Countdown
info.summary: Manage and display modern and customizable countdowns
info.description:
Track your most anticipated game releases, movie premieres, and TV series finales with style! Fuel the anticipation for major blockbusters, next-gen titles, and upcoming seasons.
- 🕒 Track upcoming releases: Manage countdowns for your most hyped entertainment. - 🎨 Sleek glassmorphism UI: Fast, elegant, and native to Nextcloud. - 🏗️ Custom sizes (S/M/L): Highlight your most anticipated titles. - 📊 HUD Widgets: Track your release questline at a glance on the dashboard. - 🔔 Day-One notifications: Get alerts when the wait is finally over. - 🌗 Dark & Light modes: Matches your Nextcloud theme.
info.author: Felt
